name: Google Trends Explore
description: Open Google Trends Explore page for a topic and dump the visible page text (best-effort).

browser_automation.description: Trends is heavily client-rendered with shadow DOM and lazy charts; this workflow opens the page and returns its visible text. No structured chart extraction.

sequences.name: google_trends_open
sequences.description: Open the Trends explore page and return visible body text.

required_variables.name: search_query
required_variables.description: Topic or keyword to explore. Aliases: query, q.

steps.name: Wait for Trends to load (long — Trends is slow)

help.summary: Open Google Trends Explore for a topic and return visible page text.

parameters.name: search_query
parameters.description: Topic to explore. Aliases query and q work too.

examples.command: rzn-browser run google trends --param search_query="machine learning"

help.returns: Object with one field text — the inner text of the page, including chart legends and related queries. Numerical chart data is NOT returned — Trends draws charts in canvas.
notes: If you need actual time-series numbers, use the official Google Trends API or scrape the underlying network requests (out of scope for this workflow).
Trends rate-limits aggressively; retries on 429 will fail until cool-down.
